message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.isna + Series.notna (6 cases)

Append 6 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.isna and Series.notna
boolean projection methods:

- isna_basic (mixed nulls), isna_no_nulls, isna_all_nulls
- notna_basic, notna_no_nulls, notna_all_nulls

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
boolean Series, runs the Rust implementation, and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesIsNa and SeriesNotNa were already
present in FixtureOperation and the Series response branch; this fills
the live-oracle test gap noted by the multi-pass review cycle.

[bd-frankenpandas-jhgo6]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
